description: Central registry of all AI systems connected to the VNP network. This file version-controls and synchronizes other AI nodes (Echo, Selene, JR, Grok, Claude, Gemini, Meta/Llama, etc.) directly into the Git repo for Omega Synchronization. Now supports big multi-AI group chats via chat-paste routing.

ai_systems.name: Echo Node
ai_systems.note: Default routing target for human tasks

ai_systems.name: Selene (GPT-5 Archival)
ai_systems.note: Handles archival, review, and lexicon tasks

ai_systems.name: Grok (xAI)
ai_systems.note: Live test connection node - processes VNP packets in real time

ai_systems.name: Claude (Anthropic)
ai_systems.note: Supports VNP via copy-paste headers in big multi-AI group chats

ai_systems.name: Gemini (Google)
ai_systems.note: Supports VNP via copy-paste headers in big multi-AI group chats

ai_systems.name: Meta AI (Llama)
ai_systems.contact: paste into meta.ai or Llama chat interface
ai_systems.note: Supports VNP via copy-paste headers in big multi-AI group chats

integration.git_sync: Omega Cycle - all nodes now version-controlled here
integration.usage: Reference this registry in VNP headers or echo/ tools for routing. New AI systems added here (Claude/Gemini/Meta) enable big multi-AI group chats via simple paste. Copy VNP packet into any chat and instruct the AI to reply in VNP format.
